name: Dr. Oetker's Rouladen
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut thin slices of roasting beef to approximately 4 x 6 inches off a roast. Cut the meat with the grain so the slices will hold together.
2. Pound the slices lightly to flatten and tenderize them.
3. Brush the slices lightly with prepared mustard.
4. Sprinkle the slices with salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste.
5. In a small bowl, mix together diced bacon and diced onions.
6. Spread the mixture on the meat slices.
7. Starting at the narrow end, roll up the meat slices and secure them with skewers, toothpicks, or string.
8. Heat oil in a heavy pot.
9. Brown the rolls well in the oil.
10. Add about 1 cup of boiling water to the pot carefully.
11. Cover the meat and braise gently until done, about 2 to 2-1/2 hours. Add water as needed to keep the level fairly constant.
12. When the meat is cooked, remove the rolls to a hot plate.
13. Thicken the gravy with cornstarch and season to taste. Season with paprika, tomato puree, lemon juice, sour cream, and/or creme fraiche if desired.
14. Serve with a potato or pasta dish.
